items.claim: Abdul Hussein has a high number of submission victories on his record.
items.quote: he's got a lot of submission victories.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has very poor takedown accuracy.
items.quote: he has a very, very bad takedown accuracy.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is prone to gassing out by the second round.
items.quote: Gibson gas out of course in the second round

items.claim: Abdul Hussein is a bit small for the weight class and has trouble making 125 lbs.
items.quote: I really wonder if there's any chance at all that this guy could make 125 lbs because I do think he's a bit small for this weight class.

items.claim: Mike Davis is a Brazilian jiu-jitsu black belt and a very good wrestler.
items.quote: He's a black belt in Brazilian jiu-jitsu. He's a very good wrestler.

items.claim: Mike Davis is inconsistent and has unpredictable performances.
items.quote: he's just not someone that you can really trust. I think he's a very very u all over the place fighter.

items.claim: Nurullo Aliev has a sneaky and effective jab.
items.quote: Ali's best part of his game is actually the jab which is pretty sneaky.
